summary: Backend (pytest 12/12) and frontend (Playwright) tested for Copa ESTECA 2026 multi-tournament platform. All 12 new plural-endpoint tests pass (tournaments_v2 collection, create/get/put/delete/list/summary). UI: Spanish content, sidebar, Crear-torneo form, Sorteo team entry, Torneo completo generation (30/30 matches, 0 repeats), Eliminación/Estadísticas placeholders, Créditos page, delete-from-Inicio + AlertDialog, reload-persistence all work. Found 2 critical state-sync issues: (1) Jornadas y partidos page shows 'Aún no hay partidos' for all 6 jornadas despite backend having 30 matches, (2) Tabla general shows 'Aún no hay equipos registrados' despite 11 teams added. Inicio card shows 0/11 equipos and 0/6 jornada (teams_registered=0 in summary), suggesting Sorteo team additions are not being persisted (or aren't being computed in summary).

minor.issue: Uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown'); migrate to lifespan context manager

integration_issues.issue: After 'Torneo completo' generation, navigating to /t/{id}/jornadas shows 'Aún no hay partidos asignados a esta jornada' for all 6 jornadas even though GET /api/tournaments/{id} returns 30 matches across 6 matchdays. JornadasPage appears to read stale AppLayout context without refetching after Sorteo updates.
Tabla general page shows 'Aún no hay equipos registrados' even after adding 11 teams in Sorteo. Same root cause (stale context / no refetch on route change).

Inicio TournamentCard displays '0/11 EQUIPOS' and '0/6 JORNADA' and 0% AVANCE after adding 11 teams + generating all matchdays. Backend GET /tournaments/{id} confirms matchdays have 30 matches, but list-summary endpoint computes teams_registered=0 because the teams[] array on the document remains empty. This means SorteoPage's add-team flow updates local state and the matchdays survive via debounced PUT, but the teams[] payload is not being persisted to MongoDB (or PUT is sending matchdays only).

action_items: Fix SorteoPage debounced PUT to include teams[] payload alongside matchdays so teams_registered/progress compute correctly and Tabla shows teams.

Make JornadasPage and TablaGeneralPage subscribe to live tournament state from AppLayout (refetch on route change or share matchdays via context/store) so freshly generated matches/teams render without page reload.
Verify Inicio TournamentCard stats refresh after returning from Sorteo (currently shows 0/11).
critical_code_review_comments: AppLayout likely fetches tournament once and child pages (Jornadas/Tabla) consume that stale snapshot; introduce a refetch trigger or a shared store (Zustand/Context with updater) keyed on tournament_id.
Consider unifying SorteoPage's PUT payload: send {teams, matchdays} together every time to avoid partial-update divergence.
_summary() in server.py computes current_matchday only from matchdays that contain matches — acceptable, but combine with matches_played count for clarity.
Deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown') – migrate to lifespan handler.

success_rate.frontend: ~75% — Crear torneo, Sorteo team entry, Torneo completo generation, Roulette infra, Reset, Sound toggle, Export menu, Eliminación/Estadísticas placeholders, Créditos, Delete from Inicio with AlertDialog, Persistence reload all work. Jornadas page + Tabla general + Inicio card stats do NOT reflect updated state (3 integration failures).

seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed tournaments and clean up via DELETE /api/tournaments/{id} in fixtures.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend BASE_URL pulled from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env (currently https://liga-sorteo-equipos.preview.emergentagent.com). Endpoints are plural: /api/tournaments (list+post), /api/tournaments/{id} (get/put/delete). Collection is tournaments_v2. Frontend testids used: hero-create-button, sidebar-crear-link, submit-create, nav-inicio/crear/creditos/sorteo/jornadas/tabla/eliminacion/estadisticas, add-team-input, add-short-input, add-team-button, add-team-logo-input, toggle-sound-button, export-button, reset-tournament-button, delete-tournament-*. AlertDialog confirm uses 'Generar' / 'Eliminar'. After clicking 'Torneo completo' confirm with 'Generar' button. Backend confirms 30 matches + 0 repeats generated correctly, but Jornadas/Tabla UI pages don't show them — issue is in state propagation between SorteoPage updates and sibling routes, not in backend.
rca of the issue: Sorteo page works (local state + debounced PUT for matchdays). However: (a) The team array isn't being persisted (Inicio card shows 0/11 teams_registered). (b) JornadasPage and TablaGeneralPage do not refetch the tournament from /api/tournaments/{id} on mount/route-change; they read from AppLayout's initial snapshot which doesn't include the matches/teams created during the Sorteo session. Reproduction: create tournament -> add 11 teams in Sorteo -> click 'Torneo completo' + confirm -> click 'Jornadas y partidos' nav -> observe empty jornadas. Backend GET /api/tournaments/{id} returns 30 matches confirming the data exists server-side.
